use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons triggering form submissions or key user flows
Destructive action triggers with destructive variant styling for delete or remove operations
Secondary and outline-styled buttons for supporting actions alongside primary CTAs
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar or navigation interfaces
Navigation links styled as buttons using the link variant with underline behavior
ai_summary: A reusable button component with variant-based styling powered by class-variance-authority, supporting six visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition and follows standard accessible patterns with focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling. Designed as a foundational UI primitive that integrates with any design system using Tailwind CSS.
